gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/236)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/236)
text: إِنَّ الْمَيِّتَ إِذَا حَضَرَهُ الْمَوْتُ أَوْثَقَهُ مَلَكُ الْمَوْتِ وَ لَوْ لَا ذَلِكَ مَا اسْتَقَرَّ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The dying one, when death presents itself to him, the Angel of death ties him down, and had it not been for that, he would not be calm’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali has narrated from his father from ‘Abd Allah ibn al-Mughirah from al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that when a person is about to die, the angel of death ties him down; otherwise, he will not calm down.”
